Hero.name: Hamidreza Fallahi
Hero.tagline: Architecting scalable, SEO-optimized frontends for complex systems
Hero.description: I specialize in frontend engineering with React, Next.js and TypeScript, with deep experience building large-scale ERP systems, complex Master-Detail forms, and data-intensive admin panels. I leverage tools like Redux Toolkit, RTK Query, IndexedDB and PWA to deliver high-performance, maintainable and SEO-friendly applications.

experience.subtitle: Years of Professional Experience
experience.description: Frontend engineering for production-grade systems including large-scale ERP and data-intensive admin panels

projects.subtitle: Real-World Projects
projects.description: From complex ERP systems and organizational panels to online stores and PWA applications

technical.subtitle: Focus on SEO & Performance
technical.description: Delivering fast, maintainable and SEO-optimized interfaces with modern architecture and server-side rendering

About.title: Frontend Development with focus on scalability, user experience and code quality
About.paragraph1: I specialize in building complex, data-driven interfaces — particularly ERP systems, organizational panels and applications with intricate Master-Detail forms, multi-level permissions and real-time data flows.
About.paragraph2: My stack centers on Next.js, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit and RTK Query. I put serious focus on performance optimization, offline capabilities with IndexedDB, SEO via server-side rendering and long-term maintainability through clean architecture.
About.paragraph3: If you need a frontend engineer who thinks beyond the UI layer — about data flow, state architecture and product stability — let's talk.

Projects.title: Projects that show how I think and build
Projects.subtitle: From large-scale ERP systems to SEO-optimized storefronts — each project reflects decisions made around architecture, performance and maintainability.

erp.title: Enterprise ERP Dashboard
erp.description: Full-scale ERP frontend with complex Master-Detail forms, multi-level access control, dynamic workflows and offline support via IndexedDB. Built for high data volume and long-term maintainability.
erp.tags: Next.js, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, RTK Query, IndexedDB, Ant Design

ecommerce.title: SEO-Driven E-Commerce Platform
ecommerce.description: Online store with server-side rendering for maximum SEO, PWA support for offline access and a fast, smooth shopping experience connected to an ASP.NET Core backend.

designSystem.title: Admin Panel Design System
designSystem.description: Component-driven design system for a large admin panel built with Ant Design and Material UI — focused on consistency, reusability and faster feature development across teams.
designSystem.tags: React, TypeScript, Ant Design, Material UI, Reusable Components

Experience.title: My experience has been on products that must actually work

erp.description: Building large-scale ERP interfaces with complex Master-Detail forms, multi-level access control and dynamic operational modules. Leveraging Redux Toolkit, RTK Query and IndexedDB for performance, offline support and maintainable state architecture.

ecommerce.description: Developing online stores and web applications with Next.js and ASP.NET Core — with strong focus on SSR for SEO, PWA for offline access and clean project architecture.

opensource.description: Building and maintaining reusable React components and frontend utilities — focused on developer experience, real-world reliability and clean API design.

OpenSource.title: Open source is not just coding for me; it is part of my professional identity

project.title: react-persian-range-picker
project.description: A lightweight, fully-typed date range picker supporting both Jalali and Gregorian calendars. Built with React and TypeScript — production-ready and actively used in real enterprise projects.
project.tags: React, TypeScript, Jalali Calendar, Open Source

Contact.title: Looking for a Frontend Engineer Who Delivers Production-Ready Code?
Contact.description: Available for frontend projects involving complex admin panels, ERP systems, data-driven dashboards, or performance optimization. Experienced with React, Next.js, and scalable state architecture.
